items: Welcome by the School Board President

Oral Communication - If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Study Session on Distance Learning/In Person Learning

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No formal agenda changes announced during the early part of the meeting. The president stated 'we have kind of a simple agenda if there are any changes or we need a motion to approve' and the agenda was approved by roll call vote without announced changes.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: So moved. Alisa. Second. Maria. Can we have a roll call vote, please? Trustee McBride. Aye. Trustee Marquez. Trustee D. Silocum. Aye. Vice President Macavoy. Aye. President Lawson. Aye.

items.intro_words: Trustee McBride. Here. Trustee Marquez. Here. Trustee Locum. Here. Oh. Oh.
Welcome, Everybody, to the October 7th Rowan City School Board meeting.
Welcome by the School Board President
With that said, we have kind of a simple agenda if there are any changes
So moved. Alisa. Second. Maria. Can we have a roll call vote
We are on now oral communication, and we don't have any
we can move on to the study session. All right, thank you
Well, that's the end of our agenda. Unless there's other comments
